misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, affectionately known as "Susi-Pasi", is a formidable competitor hailing from Vuosaari Golf Helsinki. A man of few words but decisive action, Pasi has carved out a notable presence in the Hector Trophée.

With four appearances in past Hector Trophée tournaments, Pasi has demonstrated remarkable consistency. In his appearances, he has secured one coveted Hector Trophée title, showcasing his skill and determination under pressure. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his focus remains steadfast on team glory.

Off the course, Pasi harbors a passion for basketball, perhaps even surpassing that of his compatriot Marcus. Some fans joke that his dedication to basketball makes them wonder if he truly is a golfer at heart. Despite his love of basketball, Pasi's commitment to golf remains unquestionable. Though he is not participating in the Hector Trophée 2026, the possibility of a last-minute entry always lingers, adding an element of anticipation for his fans.
